ms_bot_app_id.description: Microsoft Bot App ID from Azure Bot registration.

public_base_url.description: Public base URL for Bot Framework messaging endpoint.

ms_bot_app_password.description: Microsoft Bot App Password (client secret). Falls back to secrets store if omitted.

default_service_url.description: Default Bot Connector service URL for proactive messages.

team_id.description: Default team ID if not provided in invocation.

channel_id.description: Default channel ID if not provided in invocation.
